steps.title: Set up proportional segments
steps.content:
The three parallel segments cut two transversals. Therefore, the corresponding segments on those transversals are proportional.
$$\frac{AB}{BC}=\frac{FE}{ED}$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing length
steps.content:
Substitute $AB=9$, $BC=18.5$, and $FE=8.5$. This keeps the matching segments in the same relative order on the two transversals.
$$\frac{9}{18.5}=\frac{8.5}{ED}$$
$$ED=\frac{18.5\cdot 8.5}{9}=\frac{157.25}{9}=17.47$$

steps.title: Round to the nearest tenth
steps.content: The length $17.47$ rounds to $17.5$ to the nearest tenth. The answer is B.
